notes: A big board-feel and polish update. NEW center Push/Pull life bar: a tug-of-war across the middle of the board painted in each player's deck colours, with a gold balance point that slides as life changes, deck-coloured life totals at each end, a turn chevron pointing at whose turn it is, and a living glow/shimmer on the active player's side (replaces the old turn pill). NEW card drop shadows for real depth off the board. Smoother card motion: characters glide when the row re-centres and tap/untap rotation animates instead of popping. Rested/summoning-sick characters now DARKEN while keeping their colours (matching the official app) instead of turning grey. DON polish: DON in the cost area render at full card size, DON tuck under rested characters the same way as un-rested, and attached DON show ドン!!×N. The left card preview now scrolls for cards with lots of text, and attacks play a declaration sound. Bot improvements: it now uses the 6th-character rule (play over your weakest Character when the board is full) instead of spamming 'no open character slot', and its removal targeting prioritises the real threat (Blockers / bigger bodies) rather than a random legal target. Rules fix: DON −N effects (e.g. R/P Law's -3) can now return attached DON, in the engine, the UI and the bots.
